source_request: Plan GitHub issue #3: Define Cross-Product Identity Link Minimums.

criteria.description: Cross-product ref and link shapes are documented.
criteria.notes: PASS: CrossProductRef and CrossProductLink shapes and required/optional field tables are documented in docs/specs/projection-schema.md lines 531-590.

criteria.description: Required v0 link examples are documented.
criteria.notes: PASS: Required link scenarios and examples are documented in docs/specs/projection-schema.md lines 607-721. All 4 inline JSON fenced examples parsed successfully.

criteria.description: Campfit provider field to Surface claim to Flow Review Item mapping can be represented.
criteria.notes: PASS: Campfit provider field, Surface claim, and Flow review item refs plus derived_from, updates, and reviews links are documented in docs/specs/projection-schema.md lines 668-718.

criteria.description: References must include product, kind, id, and optional label/url.
Links must include from, to, relation, and optional strength.
v0 relation vocabulary must support supports, blocks, updates, reviews, produced_by, evidenced_by, controls, and derived_from.
The spec must identify which links are required for v0 console usefulness.

goal_fit.summary: Verified. docs/specs/projection-schema.md provides a durable docs/spec contract for v0 identity links, preserves issue #3 requirements, and remains within docs/artifact scope.
